title: ctenopteris pachycaula
intro: Ctenopteris pachycaula, also known as the Fern Ctenopteris or Pachycaul, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenopteris pachycaula include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Ctenopteris pachycaula can be prepared into herbal infusions, teas, or ointments for topical application, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
